args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%bruc%maginnis%' AND lower(title) LIKE '%street%hype%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%bruc%maginnis%' AND lower(title) LIKE '%street%hype%';

args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%hype%';

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122,4628,14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122,4628,14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;
